About Us

DFW's TrustedTowing Partner

We are a family-owned company proudly serving the Dallas–Fort Worth area. Legacy Dodge LLC provides a complete range of roadside services — from battery jump-starts and fuel delivery, to local and long-distance towing. We are licensed and insured in Texas, and we treat every customer like family.

Licensed & Insured

Fully certified to operate in Texas

24/7 Availability

We're here whenever you need us

Full DFW Coverage

Serving all cities across DFW

Family Owned

Personal service you can trust

What We Do

Our Services

From emergency towing to everyday roadside help — we handle it all, any time of day or night across DFW.

Emergency Towing

Stuck on the road? We dispatch immediately. 24/7 emergency towing for all vehicle types across the DFW metroplex.

Roadside Assistance

Comprehensive roadside help wherever you are in DFW. Fast, professional, and available around the clock.

Vehicle Recovery

Accident recovery and vehicle extraction handled with expert care and equipment to prevent further damage.

Light Duty Towing

Safe and efficient towing for cars, SUVs, and light trucks — handled with top-tier flatbed equipment.

Jump Start

Dead battery? Our team arrives quickly to jump-start your vehicle and get you safely back on your way.

Tire Change

Flat tire got you stranded on a DFW highway? We'll swap it fast so you're rolling again in no time.

Lockouts

Locked your keys inside? Our technicians safely unlock your vehicle without causing any damage.

Winch Outs

Stuck in mud, a ditch, or off-road terrain? Our winch-out service pulls your vehicle to safety fast.

Fuel Delivery

Ran out of gas anywhere in DFW? We bring fuel directly to your location — no need to abandon your vehicle.

Battery Replacement

We supply and install replacement batteries on the spot. No tow, no shop visit, no hassle.

Private Property Towing

Unauthorized vehicles on your property? We handle private property tows professionally and legally in Texas.

Need Help Right Now?

Our team is standing by 24/7. One call and we're on our way — fast dispatch guaranteed across DFW.
